overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a wooden dock by a lake, following a cliffside path, and entering a dark cave. The scene transitions from open waterfront to enclosed rocky terrain with autumn foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock on lake shore

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the wooden dock overlooking the calm lake

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock surface
calm reflective lake water extending to the horizon
thick rope handrails supported by wooden posts along the dock edge
tree-covered hills with autumn foliage across the lake

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a weathered wooden dock extending over a calm lake. The open waterfront offers expansive views of distant forested shores under a clear midday sky, with rope railings lining the right side of the path.

events.description: path becomes enclosed by rocky cliff face on the left as the lake view narrows

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrowing wooden path built into the cliffside, with rock walls rising on the left

entered.detail: tall gray rock wall with patches of moss and autumn vegetation
vertical timber posts supporting the walkway against the cliff

segments.scene_description: The wooden path narrows as it hugs a rocky cliff face, with the lake still visible to the right. Vertical wooden supports appear, bracing the walkway against the stone wall as the environment becomes more enclosed and the open water fades from view.

events.description: approaching cave entrance, lighting dims significantly entering shadow
entering the dark cave interior from the cliffside path

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the dark cave entrance, transitioning from bright sunlight to the shadowy interior

entered.detail: dark opening between rock walls leading into the cave depths
rough stone wall forming the left side of the cave entrance
rough stone wall forming the right side of the cave entrance
shadowy depths of the cave visible beyond the entrance

segments.scene_description: The path leads directly into a dark cave entrance, with rock walls closing in on both sides. As Geralt enters around the 14-second mark, the lighting drops dramatically from natural sunlight to dim shadows, transitioning from the cliffside exterior to the cave interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an expansive, sunlit waterfront into the oppressive darkness of a rocky cavern. It begins with Geralt walking along a weathered wooden dock over a calm lake, where the open landscape reveals distant forested shores under a clear midday sky. As the path narrows, the camera follows him as the walkway hugs a rocky cliff face, with vertical wooden supports bracing the path against the stone while the open water gradually fades from view. The scene then shifts as the rock walls close in on both sides, leading directly toward a dark cave entrance. Finally, the lighting drops dramatically from natural sunlight to dim shadows as the camera moves from the cliffside exterior into the depths of the cave.
